name: 7-in-1 Immunity Support Liposomal
description_html:
An Immunity Boost With 7 Ingredients!

Support Your Immune System With Essential Nutrients! Deliver immune-supporting ingredients to your body via liposomal technology.

Antioxidants Vitamin C and Vitamin E are essential vitamins that cannot be produced by the body on its own. Vitamin C helps limit the damage done by free radicals while supporting immune function and overall well-being.

  • Vitamin D3 aids the body in absorbing Phosphorus and Calcium, supporting immune functions and bone health. 

Zinc is also included in this immune-supporting formula. Zinc is one of the most abundant trace minerals in your body, and it is present in all body tissues. The optimal concentration of Zinc in the body is necessary for healthy immune function, and homeostasis of this mineral plays a role in supporting the health of your body’s macrophages, an important component of your innate immune system. 

Elderberry, a traditionally used herbal, also helps to support immune function. Also included is another herbal, echinacea, as well as ginger, to round out this 7-in-1 supplement! 

 

Each bottle comes with 30 servings.  

Quick Facts About Liposomals

  • Liposomes are tiny spherical structures that have a protective outer layer and an inner cavity to hold and transport substances such as vitamins or other nutrients to the body.
  • These tiny structures encapsulate these substances and can lead to ultra absorption!
  • Our products’ liposomal delivery system works by encapsulating the vitamins/nutrients into liposomal structures, allowing these nutrients to be easily absorbed in the gut.

name: Activated Charcoal Capsules
description_html:
Lights, Camera, Activated Charcoal!

Our activated charcoal, made from organic coconut shell, comes in easy-to-take, vegan capsules derived from pine trees. 

Activated charcoal differs from regular charcoal in that it is more porous, allowing it to filter and adsorb more material.

Activated charcoal has undergone a special activation process that creates greater surface area, making the charcoal better able to adsorb many substances. Unlike absorption, which draws molecules into a material, adsorption draws molecules to adhere to the surface of the material. 

Simply take 1-2 capsules when needed with water and/or food.

 

Each bottle comes with 20-40 servings.  

**These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Since all bodies are different, an individual’s nutrient needs are unique to their body. As such, results may vary. Children under 12, seniors over 65, pregnant and lactating women should always consult with a physician or healthcare professional prior to use.

Charcoal is often used in clinical settings for the treatment of more serious events of toxic ingestion; this product is not intended to replace this treatment plan, which should only occur under the supervision of a physician.   

**If you or a family member has ingested toxic or poisonous substances, please contact Poison Control for more information: 1-800-222-1222.

Q: What is creatine?

A: Creatine is a naturally occurring compound found in muscle cells that helps increase energy production during repetitive bouts of short-term, high intensity exercise.

A: These gummies are designed for adults (18+) to help improve resistance to fatigue and aid post-workout recovery after repetitive bouts of short-term, high intensity exercise. If you have any health conditions or are pregnant/nursing, consult a healthcare provider before use.

Q: How many gummies should I take per day?

A: The recommended serving size is 3 gummies per day, providing 3 g of Creatine Monohydrate. These Creatine Gummies provide in total 30 days of supply.

Q: Do I need to do a creatine loading phase?

A: A loading phase is not required for Creatine Gummies. While some prefer to take higher doses for the first 5-7 days to saturate muscle stores quickly, consistent daily intake of 3 g per day for 30 days is sufficient.

FAQs

Q: How does Lustriva® support hair growth and improve wrinkles? 

A: Lustriva® is a complex that combines Bonded Arginine Silicate with Magnesium Biotinate, a new and superior form of biotin and silicon, to help grow thicker, fuller hair and reduce fine lines and wrinkles in women. Magnesium Biotinate is a novel complex of magnesium ionically bound to biotin. This unique complex significantly increases biotin solubility 40 times greater than that of D-biotin, the type commonly found in beauty products. 

Q: Will this supplement help me with hair breakage?  

A: Unfortunately, we don’t have any specific data on how Lustriva® may affect the breakage that you might be experiencing. However, Lustriva® has been clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller hair in women. 

Q: Is this product suitable for men? 

A: This product contains the trademarked ingredient Lustriva® which is clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller hair, and improve wrinkles and fine lines in women. The research on Lustriva was conducted solely in women and not in men. While the research on Lustriva® was conducted solely in women, these products may be used by men. There are a variety of reasons that a person's hair may start to thin, and for men, the most common reason is related to androgenic alopecia (otherwise known as “male pattern baldness”). Since androgenic alopecia is considered a health condition, it is outside our scope as a dietary supplement brand to speak about, and our best advice is to consult with a dermatologist, physician, or healthcare professional for their guidance.nt brand to speak about, and our best advice is to consult with a dermatologist, physician, or healthcare professional for their guidance.

How To Take

Do not exceed the recommended dose.

  • 4-13 Years: 1 Tablespoon (15 mL)

Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate after opening.

How It Works Disclaimer

KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN 
We genuinely care about all our customers. Please consult with a physician or healthcare professional before starting any health supplement, especially if pregnant or lactating, taking medication, or if you have a medical diagnosis. Discontinue use if any negative reaction occurs.

CLP Certified, Non-GMO Project Verified, Vegan, Dairy Free, Gluten Free, Nut Free, Soy Free, Sugar Free, GMP Facility Made, Kid Formulated

Unique Selling Point

Immune Support, Cognitive Function, Overall Wellness

FAQs

Q: Why are some of the daily value percentages under 100%, while some are over? Wouldn’t I want my child to receive 100% of everything?

A: This is a great question! Fat-soluble vitamins, like vitamins A, D & E, are vitamins that are stored in the body, in contrast to water-soluble vitamins (like B vitamins), which are expelled when consumed in excess. Since the body stores fat-soluble vitamins, excess amounts can build up and create toxicity. A varied and healthy diet should provide the body with a good portion of these vitamins, but we know that doesn’t always happen, especially if your child is a picky eater or if there are dietary restrictions involved. We have formulated this liquid multivitamin to account for these factors as best we could. We recommend consulting with your child’s physician or healthcare professional to make certain this product is appropriate for your child’s nutrient needs!

Q: Do you have any tips on kids and vitamins?

A: Yes, we have a few! First and foremost: be sure to consult with your child’s physician or healthcare professional prior to use to make sure this product is suitable for your child. This is particularly true if your child is experiencing any health challenges, is taking any medications or if your child is under the age of twelve. As much as we pride ourselves on making great tasting vitamins, we do want to advise that you keep these liquid vitamins out of reach of your children. They are not candy and they should not be treated as such. It is possible to get too much of a good thing! If you are concerned that your child may have taken too much of the liquid, please call the Poison Control hotline: 1 (800) 222-1222 (available 24/7).

Q: My child has MTHFR gene variant(s). Is this product safe for my child(ren)?

A: In general, when starting any new health and wellness supplement, you should check with your child's pediatrician, physician, or healthcare professional to make sure the supplement is suitable for your child. This is especially true when there is the added complexity of the MTHFR gene variants. We encourage you to partner with your child's healthcare professional to determine the best course of action.

Q: Why is there no iron in this Kids Morning Multivitamin?

A: When formulating our liquid multivitamins, we wanted to make a multivitamin that had the best possible combination of micronutrients for optimal absorption. Since micronutrient competition is important to keep in mind when formulating the best liquid multivitamin, and iron can interfere with the body's absorption of other vitamins and minerals, we decided to not include iron in our liquid multivitamins. For those who would like to supplement with iron, we have a stand-alone Liquid Iron supplement in a delicious berry flavor for ages 4 and up, as well as Organic Toddler Iron Liquid Drops!

End your day with support for both wellness and beauty from within! This delicious liquid includes Sepitone™, clinically shown in women to improve skin elasticity, firmness, and fine wrinkles, plus zinc, selenium, and vitamin D to support bone health, immunity, and overall wellness. 

How It Works

Bedtime Routine: Wind down and support healthy hair, skin, and nails with this berry-flavored liquid as a part of your nighttime routine, all with no hard-to-swallow pills and NO melatonin! Just like our original liquid nighttime formulas, this multimineral contains seven minerals — magnesium, calcium, zinc, selenium, copper, manganese, and chromium.

This trademarked ingredient is also clinically shown in women to help improve skin firmness and texture, offering extra care in your nighttime routine. ^^

Wrinkle Reduction: Sepitone is clinically shown in women to help reduce fine wrinkles and even helps to reduce wrinkle depth and crow’s feet wrinkles, supporting beauty from within. ^^

Immunity & Skin Health: Zinc helps support immunity, maintain skin health, and aid DNA synthesis and repair.

Antioxidant & Thyroid Support: Selenium acts as an antioxidant and supports normal thyroid function, making it an important part of overall wellness.

Mineral Absorption & Bone Health: Vitamin D helps support and maintain mineral absorption, bone health, and muscle function.

Dream Duo: Combine the powerful benefits of our Liquid Morning Multivitamin + Hair Growth and the Liquid Nighttime Multimineral + Skin Renew for the hair and skin of your dreams while receiving essential nutrients each AM & PM!

How To Take

Suggested Use:  

Shake well before use. Adults 18+, take up to 2 tbsp (30 mL) once daily or as recommended by a physician or healthcare professional. Take about 10 min to 1 hour before bed, either with food, juice or on an empty stomach. Do not exceed the recommended dose. 

Product Storage  

Store in a dry, cool place. Refrigerate after opening. Use within 6 months of opening.

How It Works Disclaimer

KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN 

We genuinely care about all our customers. Please consult with a physician or healthcare professional before starting any health supplement, especially if pregnant or lactating, taking medication, or if you have a medical diagnosis. Discontinue use if any negative reaction occurs. 

With 30 days of continued usage at 1 serving per day. This bottle provides 15 servings.

CLP Certified, Non-GMO, Vegan, Dairy Free, Gluten Free, Nut Free, Soy Free, GMP Facility Made

Unique Selling Point

Improve Skin Firmness, Increase Skin Elasticity, Reduce Wrinkle Depth

FAQs

Q: Are the bottles BPA-free?

A: Yes, the brown and white bottles we use for our Multis are BPA-free.

Q: What if I forgot to refrigerate my Multimineral?

A: Some customers have forgotten to refrigerate their Multis after opening. We have done testing on the multivitamins and multiminerals: results suggest they are good for 7 days out of the refrigerator. We like to err on the side of safety and say 5 days.

Q: Is this product suitable for men?

A: This broad-spectrum multimineral contains the trademarked ingredient Sepitone™, which is clinically shown to increase skin elasticity, improve skin firmness and texture, and reduce fine wrinkles in women. The research on Sepitone was conducted solely in women and not in men. While the research on Sepitone was conducted solely on women, these products may be used by men.

Q: How quickly will I see results from using Sepitone™?

A: Sepitone is shown in women to help improve skin firmness and texture, reduce fine wrinkles, and increase skin elasticity in as early as 28 days of continued use.

Q: How does this product reduce wrinkles?

A: Sepitone is a trademarked ingredient that is clinically shown to increase skin elasticity, improve skin firmness and texture, and reduce fine wrinkles in women.

Q: Why should I take a multimineral before bed?

A: This Liquid Multimineral contains Vitamin D and essential minerals that your body needs for overall wellness, with the addition of Sepitone™ to help improve skin firmness and reduce fine wrinkles in women. Add this to your nighttime routine and nourish your body while you rest!

FAQs

Q: What’s the difference between this and the Liquid Morning Multivitamin + Hair Growth? Can I take both?

A: Great questions! Firstly, we do not recommend taking these two products together, as they are both broad spectrum multivitamins and contain multiple nutrients in duplicate — taking both in the same day would likely be in excess of your individual nutrient needs.

While both are multivitamins with 160 mg Lustriva per serving, there are a few differences between the Liquid Morning Multivitamin + Hair Growth and Multivitamin + Hair Growth Gummies. Namely, the liquid formula contains thiamin and choline which are not in the gummies, and the gummies contain iodine and selenium which are not in the liquid. Additionally, some amounts of the nutrients vary from product to product.

Our best advice is to choose the format that you’ll enjoy the best and will help you to keep a consistent daily routine. When assessing the best dietary supplements for your health, we also recommend speaking with your physician, or healthcare professional, as they can help you to determine what supplements and dosage may be appropriate for your nutrient needs.

Q: How does Lustriva® support hair growth and improve wrinkles?

A: Lustriva® is a complex that combines Bonded Arginine Silicate with Magnesium Biotinate, a new and superior form of biotin and silicon, to help grow thicker, fuller hair and reduce fine lines and wrinkles in women. Magnesium Biotinate is a novel complex of magnesium ionically bound to biotin. This unique complex significantly increases biotin solubility 40 times greater than that of D-biotin, the type commonly found in beauty products.

Q: Will this supplement help me with hair breakage?

A: Unfortunately, we don’t have any specific data on how Lustriva® may affect the breakage that you might be experiencing. However, Lustriva® has been clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller hair in women!

Q: Is this product suitable for men?

A: This broad-spectrum multivitamin contains the trademarked ingredient Lustriva® which is clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller hair, and improve wrinkles and fine lines in women. The research on Lustriva was conducted solely in women and not in men. While the research on Lustriva® was conducted solely in women, these products may be used by men. There are a variety of reasons that a person's hair may start to thin, and for men, the most common reason is related to androgenic alopecia (otherwise known as “male pattern baldness”). Since androgenic alopecia is considered a health condition, it is outside our scope as a dietary supplement brand to speak about, and our best advice is to consult with a dermatologist, physician, or healthcare professional for their guidance.

name: Women's Multivitamin + Hair Growth Liposomal
description_html:
Formulated for women, this sweet and smooth liposomal multivitamin delivers ultra absorption and 11+ essential nutrients. With clinically shown Lustriva®, it helps grow thicker, fuller existing hair in as early as 3 weeks and improve facial fine lines, wrinkles, and smoothness.

How It Works

  • Ultra Absorption: Our products’ liposomal delivery system works by encapsulating the vitamins/nutrients into liposomal structures, allowing these nutrients to be easily absorbed in the gut.
  • Thicker, Fuller Hair: With Lustriva®, clinically shown in women to help support growth of existing hair to increase hair thickness in as early as 3 weeks.
  • Skin Support: Lustriva® is also shown in women to improve facial fine lines, wrinkles, and smoothness — beauty support from within. Riboflavin and Niacin, two essential nutrients in this formula, also help support skin health.
  • Body Composition: Chromium picolinate supports healthy body composition, healthy metabolism, and helps maintain a healthy blood sugar level already within a normal range.  
  • Cognitive Function: This delicious multivitamin blend includes key nutrients pantothenic acid, biotin, niacin, and vitamin B12 to support brain function.
  • Cardiac Function: Thiamin, an essential nutrient included in this blend, plays a key role in supporting cardiac and brain functions, as well as energy metabolism.
  • B-Vitamins: This women’s multivitamin includes all eight B vitamins to support vital functions like skin health, energy metabolism, other various metabolic processes, circulatory health, DNA synthesis, neurotransmitter synthesis, immune health, and more.
  • Highly Soluble Biotin: Magnesium biotinate is a unique form of biotin that is 40x more soluble than D-biotin.
  • Iron Metabolism & Bone Health: Vitamin A helps maintain bone health in addition to the normal metabolism of iron.
  • Bone & Muscle Support: Vitamin D3 supports bone health, muscle function, and mineral absorption.

How To Take

Suggested Use: Shake well before use. Adults 18+ take up to 1 tbsp (15 mL) daily or as recommended by a physician or healthcare professional. Take in the morning either with food, juice or on an empty stomach. Do not exceed the recommended dose. 

Store in a cool, dry place. For optimal flavor and product performance, we recommend refrigeration before and after opening.

How It Works Disclaimer

KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN 

We genuinely care about all our customers. Please consult with a physician or healthcare professional before starting any health supplement, especially if pregnant or lactating, taking medication, or if you have a medical diagnosis. Discontinue use if any negative reaction occurs.

This product contains Biotin which may interfere with some blood test results. 

NOTE: Herbal supplements may not be appropriate for everyone. Herbal products may interfere with certain medications or complicate health conditions.

Unique Value Proposition (UVP)

CLP Certified, Vegan, Dairy Free, Gluten Free, Nut Free, Soy Free, Sugar Free, GMP Facility Made.

Unique Selling Point

Ultra Absorption, Thicker, Fuller Hair, Improved Wrinkles.

FAQs

Q: How does Lustriva® support hair growth and improve wrinkles?

A: Lustriva® is a complex that combines Bonded Arginine Silicate with Magnesium Biotinate, a new and superior form of biotin and silicon, to help grow thicker, fuller existing hair and reduce facial fine lines and wrinkles in women. Magnesium Biotinate is a novel complex of magnesium ionically bound to biotin. This unique complex significantly increases biotin solubility 40 times greater than that of D-biotin, the type commonly found in beauty products.

Q: Why this amount of chromium in the product?

A: Thanks for reaching out with your great question about chromium our new Hair Growth products! Chromium is a mineral that may help support healthy metabolism. These new formulas include a higher dose of chromium (1000 mcg chromium picolinate) based on the efficacy of dosages used in clinical studies. These studies have not reported adverse effects associated with this dosage of chromium picolinate intake, indicating its safety in humans. Additionally, there is no upper limit established for chromium based on existing data for this nutrient. Ultimately, our best advice is to speak with your physician or healthcare professional to help you determine if this product is suitable for your needs.

Q: Will this supplement help me with hair breakage?

A: Unfortunately, we don’t have any specific data on how Lustriva® may affect the breakage that you might be experiencing. However, Lustriva® has been clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller existing hair in women!

Q: Is this product suitable for men?

A: This broad-spectrum multivitamin contains the trademarked ingredient Lustriva® which is clinically shown to help grow thicker, fuller existing hair, and improve wrinkles and fine lines in women. The research on Lustriva was conducted solely in women and not in men. While the research on Lustriva® was conducted solely in women, these products may be used by men. There are a variety of reasons that a person's hair may start to thin, and for men, the most common reason is related to androgenic alopecia (otherwise known as “male pattern baldness”). Since androgenic alopecia is considered a health condition, it is outside our scope as a dietary supplement brand to speak about, and our best advice is to consult with a dermatologist, physician, or healthcare professional for their guidance.

Q: What is the lifespan of this liposomal product? 

A: The shelf life for our Women’s Multivitamin Liposomal is 12 months, when stored in a cool, dry place (preferably refrigerated), away from oxygen and moisture in its sealed container. Once open and, if kept refrigerated, the shelf life is 6 months.

The sweatshirt comes in a bright, bold blue with the MaryRuth’s logo in red across the front. It has a full front zipper, hood with drawstring, and full pouch pocket. 


Sweatshirts available in size Small to Extra-Large.
